_metadata.description: Controlled clinical risk taxonomy for condition and medication-class interaction alerts

completed_migrations.summary: Additive: introduced profile_flags[] and product_forms[] blocks to support v6.0 profile_gate schema (see scripts/INTERACTION_RULE_SCHEMA_V6_ADR.md). No existing fields renamed or removed; conditions[], drug_classes[], severity_levels[], evidence_levels[] unchanged.

conditions.label: Diabetes
conditions.note: Covers type 1 and type 2. Merged from diabetes_type1/diabetes_type2 — supplement interactions are the same for both types (blood sugar impact, hypoglycemic risk).

drug_classes.label: Anticonvulsants (Anti-Seizure Medications)
drug_classes.mechanism_note: Supplements that affect CYP3A4/2C19 metabolism or GABAergic signaling may alter anticonvulsant drug levels or seizure threshold.

drug_classes.label: Thiazide Diuretics
drug_classes.description: Thiazide and thiazide-like diuretics. Distinct from other diuretics because they retain calcium (relevant for vitamin D + calcium supplements).

evidence_levels.description: Well-documented in human clinical literature and major references
Strong case reports or mechanistic evidence with partial human support
Biological plausibility with limited direct human evidence
Insufficient evidence for a firm interaction conclusion

evidence_levels.label: Limited
evidence_levels.description: Some data exists but is sparse or methodologically weak.

evidence_levels.label: Moderate
evidence_levels.description: Reasonable evidence base; not strong enough for established.

evidence_levels.label: No Data
evidence_levels.description: No evidence — used as gap-fill default in pregnancy_lactation.

profile_flags.label: Pregnant
profile_flags.description: User is currently pregnant. Gates pregnancy-specific alerts.

profile_flags.label: Trying to Conceive
profile_flags.description: User is actively trying to conceive (preconception). Gates TTC and many pregnancy-precautionary alerts.

profile_flags.label: Breastfeeding
profile_flags.description: User is breastfeeding. Gates lactation-specific alerts.

profile_flags.label: Post-Op Recovery
profile_flags.description: User is in post-operative recovery. Gates bleeding/wound-healing-related alerts that taper off after surgery.

profile_flags.label: Surgery Scheduled
profile_flags.description: User has a scheduled surgery within a relevant time window. Gates pre-op bleeding-risk alerts (replaces previous condition_id usage).

profile_flags.label: Hypoglycemia History
profile_flags.description: User has a history of hypoglycemia. Used to escalate diabetes interaction severity (e.g., berberine baseline caution → avoid).

profile_flags.label: Bleeding History
profile_flags.description: User has a personal/family bleeding-disorder history. Used to escalate antiplatelet/anticoagulant interaction severity.

profile_flags.label: Severely immunocompromised
profile_flags.description: User is severely immunocompromised (e.g. chemotherapy, organ transplant, high-dose immunosuppressants). Gates probiotic infection risk and other severe-only warnings.

product_forms.label: Topical Only
product_forms.description: Product is applied topically only (e.g., aloe gel for skin). Used in excludes.product_forms_any to suppress oral-systemic alerts.

product_forms.label: Culinary Turmeric
product_forms.description: Food-grade turmeric used as spice; not a high-potency curcumin extract. Used in excludes.product_forms_any to suppress curcumin extract pregnancy alert for tiny culinary amounts.

product_forms.label: High-Potency Extract
product_forms.description: Standardized high-potency extract (e.g., curcumin extract, mulberry leaf DNJ-standardized). Used to scope alerts to extract-strength dosing only.

product_forms.label: Unknown
product_forms.description: Product form not yet classified. Default for products without explicit form_scope; should not appear in excludes lists.
